creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 214787
v1 patch

upstream issue https://github.com/fish-shell/fish-shell/issues/6955 breaks many many things, including $EDITOR support.

tested w poudriere on 12.1R amd64 + 13.0-CURRENT amd64 also.

if reqd should be merged to quarterly as well, as the bug is pretty nasty.
